hero.title: A place to stand during life crises
hero.subtitle: Individual consulting based on the life wisdom of the 12-step program. I help people find their way out of co-dependent relationships, burnout, and difficult emotional states — without harsh diagnoses or labels.

about.heading: Valentin Maksimov
about.bio: My approach is built on the idea that 12-step principles work not just for classic addictions, but for ordinary people who have lost their inner balance. I help gently untangle complex life patterns, regain control over emotions, and build healthy relationships with yourself and others.

items.title: Life principles of the 12 steps
items.desc: Adapting proven self-help tools for resolving everyday crises.

items.title: Breaking free from co-dependency
items.desc: Gently building personal boundaries and returning focus to your own life.

items.title: Emotional regulation
items.desc: Practical skills for working with stress, anxiety, and burnout.

items.title: Safe space
items.desc: Complete confidentiality and support without judgment or evaluation.

items.title: Individual consultation
items.desc: An introductory meeting or working session. Together we will understand the situation and find steps forward.

items.title: Program companionship
items.desc: Systematic work through the 12-step program with individual adaptation to your needs.

items.title: Family consulting
items.desc: Working with co-dependent patterns and restoring healthy dynamics within the family.

items.q: Where do I start if I don't understand what is happening to me?
items.a: Start with a simple conversation. Write to me — I will contact you personally, without formalities or obligations.

items.q: Do you work online or only in person?
items.a: I conduct sessions both via video call and in person in Israel.

items.q: How much does a consultation cost?
items.a: Cost is discussed individually after our first introduction. Write to me — I will answer honestly.
Yes. Co-dependency and supporting loved ones is an important part of my practice.
Absolute. Everything we discuss stays between us. No records are publicly accessible.

items.title: What is co-dependency and how to recognise it
items.excerpt: Co-dependency often hides behind care. We examine the key signs and ways out.

items.title: 12 Steps: myths and reality
items.excerpt: Why the program works not as a religion but as a structure. What actually happens at meetings.

items.title: How to restore inner balance after prolonged stress
items.excerpt: Simple practices for restoring emotional stability and reconnecting with yourself.

contact.heading: Book a consultation
contact.subtitle: Write to me — this is the first step. I will contact you personally within 24 hours, with no intermediaries.
